action_set_definitions.name: get_filing_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of a specific regulatory filing, including workflow stage, authentication status, and validation requirements.

filing_id.description: The unique identifier for the regulatory filing session (e.g., 'FIL-SEC-9283-SJ').

action_set_definitions.name: authenticate_portal
action_set_definitions.description: Establishes an authenticated session with the regulatory portal using system credentials.

action_set_definitions.name: update_form_data
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the transaction details within the filing form, such as share counts and prices.

filing_id.description: The unique identifier for the filing.

shares.description: The number of shares disposed or acquired.

action_set_definitions.name: upload_filing_document
action_set_definitions.description: Uploads a required document (e.g., signature block, verification data) to the filing buffer.

filing_id.description: The unique identifier for the filing.

file_name.description: The name of the file to be uploaded.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_validation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes system-level data integrity and regulatory compliance checks on the current filing draft.

filing_id.description: The unique identifier for the filing.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_filing
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the submission of a validated filing to the regulatory body.

filing_id.description: The unique identifier for the filing.

state_description.filing_id: Unique identifier for the current regulatory filing session.
state_description.workflow_status: Current stage in the submission lifecycle (e.g., UNINITIALIZED, DRAFT, VALIDATED, SUBMITTED).
state_description.authenticated_session: Indicates if the agent has successfully logged into the regulatory portal.
state_description.uploaded_documents: List of file names currently stored in the filing buffer.
state_description.validation_checklist: A map of mandatory regulatory requirements and their current fulfillment status.
state_description.submission_timestamp: The ISO 8601 timestamp of final submission, null if not yet submitted.
